titleStmt.title: SII 19.57: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 57. (A.R. No. 107 of 1920.) ĀDIGUḌI, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE LEFT SIDE OF THE DOORWAY LEADING TO THE CENTRAL SHRINE, AṄKURĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This registers an endowment of land by Bālāśriyan Āṉai Pūdi and Āṉai Śiva-Baṭṭālakaṉ two residents of Tiruvādikuḍi a brahmadēya in Kīḻ-kūṟu of Kalārkkūṟṟam a subdivision of Maḻa-nāḍu on the northern bank of the river, for feeding 25 Brāhmaṇas on each of the 7 days of festival in the month of Māśi in the temple of Īśvara-Bhaṭṭāraka, and for a special offering to the god on the last day [tiruvēṭṭaināṉṟu], when the god was taken out in procession ‘for hunting’. This is probably an inscription of Parāntaka I.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kop
parakesari parmmaṟku
yāṇṭu 3vatu va
ṭakarai maḻanāṭṭu
kalārkkūṟṟattu
k kiḻkūṟṟu brahma
teyan tiruvā
tikuṭi raśvarabhaṭṭā
rakaṟku mācit tiruvi
ḻā veḻu nāḷum ni
catam 2 10 5 brāha
ṇa ruṇṇavum
tiruveṭṭaināṉ
ṟu peruntiruvami
rtukkumāka Ivvū
r pālāṣriya ṉāṉai
pūtiyu māṉai śiva
paṭṭālakaṉu mivvi
ru vome I
kkuṭutta kaṭuka
ṭittiṭalukkuk ki
ḻpāṟkellai I
ttevar nilat
tukku meṟkum te
ṟkellai Ūrni
lamāṉa kāṟcey
kku miruvacavaiya
raiykkālukku vaṭa
kku meṟkellai pa
ṟattuṭavaiykku
miṭaiykkaṟai muk
kāṇikku kiḻakkum
vaṭakkellai vaṭa
koṭi Orumāvaraiy
kku teṟku mivvicai
tta Ellaiyu ḷakap
paṭṭa nilam mā
Ic � Lines 39 to 45 are engraved on the right wall.39 ñ candrādityavaṟ
ceytu kuṭutto
mivviruvom I
nnilam kalliṉā
ṉ Appi kiḻavan
Itu panmāhe
śvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.57 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
